creator: jonaspalm@posteo.de
text:
After updating emulators/virtualbox-ose to 5.2.0_1, I get this error message in phpVirtualBox:


"This version of phpVirtualBox (5.1-1) is incompatible with VirtualBox 5.2.0. You probably need to download the latest phpVirtualBox 5.2-x.

See the Versioning section below the file list in the link for more information"


There is new activity in phpvirtualbox/phpvirtualbox on github and there also is a two weeks old 5.2-0-rc1 release candidate to download.
